dataset: MarineCadastre US AIS 2024-01-01 (public domain) — per-track Pattern-of-Life

onnx.rss_note: this RSS is the full TRAINING process (sklearn+numpy+onnxruntime); the honest Pi inference-only footprint is in models/nv063/pi_bench.json (~74 MB).
onnx.int8_note: dynamic quant targets MatMul/Gemm; a TreeEnsemble stores float thresholds, so size change is expected to be small — fp32 is already tiny for the Pi.

caveats: n=50 (9 pos) analyst-curated, pilot signal, SME-pending (matches eval/RESULTS.md). Unsupervised IForest fit on the pool EXCLUDING the 50; labels used only for eval. ROC-AUC/PR-AUC are threshold-free; P/R/FAR at contamination threshold.
